CLICK HERE TO BUY

Are there any Hamilton fans on your team? The musical — not the Tiger-Cats. HEAD TO THE SQUARE NAMED FOR AMERICA'S FAVORITE FIGHTING FRENCHMAN. Google it if you must. Hurry — watch for cars and streetcars. TELL ME THE FRENCHMAN'S NAME ONCE YOU ARRIVE.
Figure out which team you're on using the Team Cipher puzzle.<button class="open-cipher-btn" onclick="openTeamOverlay()">Open Team Cipher →</button>
📸 Designate a team photographer. Take a team photo here. To win this game you not only need to be the first to finish, you also need to show all of your pics! Type CLICK to continue.
You're standing in the former epicenter of New Orleans politics.

Jefferson Davis was President of the CONFEDERATE States of America — not the United States! 😮 Here's a picture from his funeral, right at Gallier Hall, 135 years ago: https://cdm16880.contentdm.oclc.org/digital/collection/p16880coll18

Now send me a photo of you or your team with Henry Clay in the background. Why he's hanging out in Lafayette Square, I'll never know.
Let's wander around the square for a minute. FIND A TREE PLANTED BY A BUSH AND TELL ME WHAT TYPE OF TREE IT IS.

stops.name: A tree planted by a Bush

messages.html:
There's a small monument on Poydras Street with a big story. In 1850, Venezuelan-born general Narciso López — who had designed what would become his adopted country's flag — sailed from New Orleans with hundreds of soldiers, carrying that flag there for the very first time in history.

Find the monument: https://what3words.com/remake.king.cloth

Oh shoot, that map tells you the name of the country. I tell you what...

Type CLICK to continue.

📸 Take a team photo at the monument. Save it for later.

Type CLICK to continue.

What do Lee Harvey Oswald, the CIA, FBI and Secret Service all have in common? They all had offices in this neighborhood at one time or another.

📸 Take a team photo in front of the building. Save it for later.

He investigated a murder. He questioned the answer. He boarded a plane and vanished. The building next to you bears his name. Who was he?
TAKE A PIC OF THE BEACON OF LIGHT STANDING BETWEEN JULIA AND HER BROTHER GIROD. Send me the name of the restaurant we're going to.
What color is next to red on the rainbow?
PAID. You are ready to continue. Up to 7 additional players can enter 711254 to play on their phone at no additional charge. You can type RESUME to continue playing now.
Welcome to New Orleans! You've made it!
Welcome! Reply START when you're ready to begin!
